# DeepSeek plain-copy assistant content casebook (100 cases)

===== case-001 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
```bash
echo hello
```

```plaintext
TODO: 下一轮继续处理剩余内容。
```
parser_summary:
{
  "id": "case-001",
  "kind": "terminal-basic",
  "chars": 59,
  "cleaned_chars": 47,
  "fenced_blocks": [
    "bash"
  ],
  "command_lang": "bash",
  "command_head": [
    "echo hello"
  ],
  "has_command": true,
  "terminal_extensions": [],
  "contains_disclaimer": false,
  "contains_ui_noise": false
}

===== case-002 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
先执行下面这一步。

```sh
echo hello
```

本回答由 AI 生成，内容仅供参考，请仔细甄别。
parser_summary:
{
  "id": "case-002",
  "kind": "terminal-basic",
  "chars": 57,
  "cleaned_chars": 31,
  "fenced_blocks": [
    "sh"
  ],
  "command_lang": "sh",
  "command_head": [
    "echo hello"
  ],
  "has_command": true,
  "terminal_extensions": [],
  "contains_disclaimer": false,
  "contains_ui_noise": false
}

echo hello

===== case-004 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
思路：先读真实文件，再运行命令。

```zsh
echo hello
```
parser_summary:
{
  "id": "case-004",
  "kind": "terminal-basic",
  "chars": 39,
  "cleaned_chars": 39,
  "fenced_blocks": [
    "zsh"
  ],
  "command_lang": "zsh",
  "command_head": [
    "echo hello"
  ],
  "has_command": true,
  "terminal_extensions": [],
  "contains_disclaimer": false,
  "contains_ui_noise": false
}

===== case-005 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
下面是当前批次：

```bash
pwd && ls -la
```

执行后我再看结果。

    "bash"

    "pwd && ls -la"

===== case-009 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
思路：先读真实文件，再运行命令。

```bash
wc -l /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/match-crush-game.html && head -3 /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/match-crush-game.html && tail -3 /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/match-crush-game.html
```
parser_summary:
{
  "id": "case-009",
  "kind": "terminal-basic",
  "chars": 219,
  "cleaned_chars": 219,
  "fenced_blocks": [
    "bash"
  ],
  "command_lang": "bash",
  "command_head": [
    "wc -l /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/match-crush-game.html && head -3 /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/match-crush-game.html && tail -3 /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/match-crush-game.html"
  ],
  "has_command": true,
  "terminal_extensions": [],
  "contains_disclaimer": false,
  "contains_ui_noise": false
}

===== case-029 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
思路：先读真实文件，再运行命令。

```bash
cat > /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py <<'PYEOF'
<!-- Python block 1 -->
PYEOF
/Users/pippo/.agent_qt/runtime/python/bin/python /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py
```
parser_summary:
{
  "id": "case-029",
  "kind": "terminal-basic",
  "chars": 206,
  "cleaned_chars": 206,
  "fenced_blocks": [
    "bash"
  ],
  "command_lang": "bash",
  "command_head": [
    "cat > /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py <<'PYEOF'",
    "<!-- Python block 1 -->",
    "PYEOF"
  ],
  "has_command": true,
  "terminal_extensions": [],
  "contains_disclaimer": false,
  "contains_ui_noise": false
}

===== case-030 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
下面是当前批次：

```sh
cat > /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py <<'PYEOF'
<!-- Python block 1 -->
PYEOF
/Users/pippo/.agent_qt/runtime/python/bin/python /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py
```

执行后我再看结果。
parser_summary:
{
  "id": "case-030",
  "kind": "terminal-basic",
  "chars": 207,
  "cleaned_chars": 207,
  "fenced_blocks": [
    "sh"
  ],
  "command_lang": "sh",
  "command_head": [
    "cat > /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py <<'PYEOF'",
    "<!-- Python block 1 -->",
    "PYEOF"
  ],
  "has_command": true,
  "terminal_extensions": [],
  "contains_disclaimer": false,
  "contains_ui_noise": false
}

===== case-032 | terminal-basic =====
assistant_content:
先执行下面这一步。

```zsh
cat > /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py <<'PYEOF'
<!-- Python block 1 -->
PYEOF
/Users/pippo/.agent_qt/runtime/python/bin/python /Users/pippo/Desktop/my-project/hello.py
```

本回答由 AI 生成，内容仅供参考，请仔细甄别。
parser_summary:
{

  "command_lang": "bash",
  "command_head": [
    "AGENT_WECHAT_CREATE_SCHEDULE: {\"title\":\"x\",\"prompt\":\"y\",\"trigger\":{\"run_at\":\"2026-05-02 23:00:00\"}}"
  ],
  "has_command": true,
  "terminal_extensions": [
    "AGENT_WECHAT_CREATE_SCHEDULE: {\"title\":\"x\",\"prompt\":\"y\",\"trigger\":{\"run_at\":\"2026-05-02 23:00:00\"}}"
  ],
  "contains_disclaimer": false,
  "contains_ui_noise": false
}
